offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inconsistent tracking causes budget overruns. We aggregate utility bills and generate variance reports instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of utility expenses leads to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Join community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try monthly variance report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
